memoryArtifacts.headline:
Thomas Hayward Mitchell
(31 May 1565 – 19 March 1628)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Thomas MITCHELL was born say about 1566 and was of Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England. 

He was part of the Separatist movement that fled to the Netherlands. 

He married Margaret (WILLIAMS) STOCKING, …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Mitchell於1565年5月31日出生在英國坎布利其爾聖 辛茲時，他的父親Sir John M Mitchell31歲，母親Elizabeth Moore27歲。他於大約1589年與Maria Tromdin在荷蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1623年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。他去世於1628年3月19日享年62歲，埋葬在亞特 澤亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Mitchell于1565年5月31日出生在英国坎布利其爾聖 辛茲时，他的父亲Sir John M Mitchell31岁，母亲Elizabeth Moore27岁。他于大约1589年与Maria Tromdin在荷兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1623年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼。他去世于1628年3月19日享年62岁，埋葬在亞特 澤亞。

nameMeanings.name: Mitchell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: from the vernacular pronunciation in Middle English and Older Scots of the personal name   Michael  . See   Michelson  .
English and Scottish: nickname for a big man, from Middle English michel, mechel, muchel ‘big’.
Irish (County Connacht): surname adopted as equivalent of   Mulvihill  .

variants.name: Michell
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Etienne, Yvrose.
English (Cornwall): variant of   Mitchell   and   Michel  .
German: variant of   Michel  . This surname is rare in Germany.

variants.name: Mutch
meanings: Scottish (Aberdeenshire) and English (Lancashire and Cheshire): nickname for a large (tall or fat) person, from Middle English moche, muche ‘big’ (a shortened form of mochel, muchel). Compare Mitchell , Meikle , and Muckle .

variants.name: Meikle
meanings: Scottish: nickname from Middle Scots mekill, meikill ‘big’. Compare Mitchell 2, Muckle , and Mutch .

variants.name: Mickle
meanings: English (Northumberland): nickname from Middle English mikel, mekel, mukel ‘big’. Compare Mitchell , Meikle , and Mutch .
Americanized form of German   Mickel   1 or of a homonymous Germanized Sorbian surname (see   Mickel   2).

variants.name: Michael
meanings: English, German, Dutch, Jewish, and Greek: from the personal name Michael, ultimately from Hebrew Mika’el ‘Who is like God?’. This was borne by an archangel in the Bible, the protector of Israel (Daniel 10:13, 12:1; Rev. 12:7). In Christian tradition, Michael was regarded as the warrior archangel, conqueror of Satan, and the personal name was correspondingly popular throughout Europe, especially in knightly and military families. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed many cognates from other languages, e.g. Hungarian Mihály (see Mihaly ), Czech and Slovak Michal , Assyrian/Chaldean or Arabic Mikhael and Mikhail , and also patronymics and other derivatives from these names, e.g. Greek Papamichael , its cognate Papamichalis, and Michaelides , Serbian Mihajlović (see Mihajlovic ), and Slovenian Mihelčič (see Mihelcic ). Compare Mikeal .

variants.name: Mixell
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of   Mitchell  .

variants.name: Muckle
meanings: English (Northumberland): nickname for a big man, from Middle English mikel, mekel, mukel ‘big’ (Old English mycel). Compare Mitchell , Meikle and Mutch .
South German: from a diminutive of   Muck   ‘gnat’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Mitchell was born on 31 May 1565, in Saint Neots, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, Sir John M Mitchell, was 31 and his mother, Elizabeth Moore, was 27. He married Maria Tromdin about 1589, in Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He immigrated to Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1623. He died on 19 March 1628, at the age of 62, and was buried in At Sea.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Mitchell est né le 31 mai 1565, à Saint Neots, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John M Mitchell, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Moore, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Maria Tromdin environ 1589, à Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il a immigré au Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1623. Il est décédé le 19 mars 1628, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à En mer.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Mitchell am 31. Mai 1565 in Saint Neots, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John M Mitchell 31 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Moore 27. Er hat um 1589 in Niederlande Maria Tromdin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er ist 1623 nach Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America eingewandert. Er starb am 19. März 1628 im Alter von 62 Jahren und wurde in Auf dem Meer begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Mitchell è nato il il 31 maggio 1565 nel Saint Neots, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John M Mitchell, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Moore, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Maria Tromdin circa 1589, nel Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Immigrato nel Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1623. Morì il 19 marzo 1628, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a At Sea.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Mitchellが1565年5月31日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアサイント ネオツで生まれた時，父Sir John M Mitchellは31歳，母Elizabeth Mooreは27歳であった。約1589年にオランダでMaria Tromdinと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1623年にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーに移住した。彼は1628年3月19日に62歳で死去し，アト セアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Mitchell(이)가 1565년 5월 31일 영국 캄브리지실르 세인트 니오츠에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John M Mitchell(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Moore(은)는 27세였다. 그는 대략 1589년 네덜란드에서 Maria Tromdin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1623년에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이로 이민을 떠났다. 그는 1628년 3월 19일 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 앳 시에 묻혔다.

pt.31 May 1565–19 March 1628: 31 de maio de 1565–19 de março de 1628
pt.Amsterdam, North Holland, Netherlands: Amsterdam, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Mitchell nasceu em 31 de maio de 1565, em Saint Neots, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John M Mitchell, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Moore, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Maria Tromdin aproximadamente 1589, em Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele imigrou para o Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1623. Ele faleceu em 19 de março de 1628, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Em alto mar.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Mitchell родился 31 мая 1565 г. в местности сеинт неоц, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John M Mitchell было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Moore, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Maria Tromdin около 1589 г. в местности Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он иммигрировал в плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1623 году. Он умер 19 марта 1628 г. в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности ат сеа.

es.31 May 1565–19 March 1628: 31 de mayo de 1565–19 de marzo de 1628
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Mitchell nació el 31 de mayo de 1565, en Saint Neots, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John M Mitchell, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Moore, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Maria Tromdin aproximadamente 1589, en Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Inmigró a Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1623. Murió el 19 de marzo de 1628, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en En el mar.
